metadata.title: Tideline — Where the sea meets the forest
metadata.description: A luxury villa set on the tideline, between the ocean and the forest. Four bedrooms, a private cliff, a silence. A ScottLab concept site.

reservation.title: Book your stay
reservation.description: Your nights on the tideline — availability and booking requests for the Tideline villa. A ScottLab concept site.

hero.title: Where the sea meetsthe forest
hero.baseline: A villa set on the tideline, between the last pine and the first wave.

villa.title: The tideline, after dark
villa.manifesto: There is a line, somewhere between the last pine and the first wave, where the forest stops growing and the ocean starts to breathe. The house sits on it. West, glass frames the open sea. East, oak opens onto the canopy. In between: a threshold, a home, a silence.

avis.title: What they say
avis.originalNote: Reviews shown in their original language

hote.title: Ask Maël
hote.intro: Sleeping arrangements, amenities, the surroundings, arrival times: Maël knows the villa by heart and replies within seconds.
hote.welcome: Good evening — I am Maël, Tideline's host. Ask me anything about the villa, its amenities or the surroundings. For rates and availability, the booking page awaits.
hote.error: Maël is momentarily unavailable. Please try again shortly, or use the booking page for any request.

suggestions.s1: How many guests can sleep here?
suggestions.s3: Can the nordic bath be used in winter?

guests.crib: Cot and high chair available on request.

confirmation.title: Request sent
confirmation.reply: We will reply within 24 hours at the address provided.
confirmation.demo: Demo — no payment, no real booking. ScottLab concept site.

notFound.title: You've wandered off the path
notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist — perhaps the tide took it.

footer.baseline: A villa between the ocean and the forest, somewhere on the wild coast.
